Title (Islandora): Kerr Inn Service gas station in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma

Description (Islandora): Black and white photograph depicting a Kerr-McGee Corporation employee checking a "Christmas tree" at Parks #1 well in Wheeler County, Texas. A "Christmas tree" refers to equipment that provides flow control on at an oil or gas well. A sign in the photograph reads "Kerr-McGee Corporation. Parks LSE. "Morrow Upper" 58699. Allison Parks (Morrow Upper) Field.

Description (Islandora): Black and white photograph undated photograph depicting the Kerr-McGee Tower in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma at night. The tower, currently known as Strata Tower, stands at 123 Robert S. Kerr Avenue, Oklahoma City, Oklahoma.
